allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('SOURCES:'\); [print\(f'  {s[\\"score\\"]:.3f} {s[\\"filename\\"]} -> {s[\\"title\\"]}'\) for s in d['sources']]")
